docs.title: 📖 Vocabulary Notes
docs.text:
Personal Japanese vocabulary notes saved via the Telegram bot.

Each note includes: - 分詞解析 (word breakdown) - 意思 (meaning) - 文法 (auxiliary verb analysis) - 例句 (example sentence + English translation) - 参考 (Kotobank + Weblio references)

Use the search bar to find any word. | こえ | こえ | textbook | 2026-05-23 | | 夢ならば | ゆめ | song | 2026-05-23 | | 朝ご飯 | あさごはん | daily | 2026-05-23 | | 埃を払う | ほこり | song | 2026-05-23 | | 心を燃やせ | こころ | anime | 2026-05-23 | | おねがいする | お | daily | 2026-05-23 | | これは本です | これ | daily | 2026-05-24 | | これは本です | これ | daily | 2026-05-24 | | これは本です | これ | daily | 2026-05-24 | | これは本です | これ | daily | 2026-05-24 | | もういいよって | もう | daily | 2026-05-24 | | もういいよって | もう | daily | 2026-05-24 | | かばんをとってください | かばん | daily | 2026-05-24 | | かばんをとってください | かばん | daily | 2026-05-24 |

docs.title: 原句 (Original)
docs.text: もういいよって

docs.title: 分詞解析
docs.text: 表面形 讀音 詞性 原形 もう もう 副詞 もう いいよっ いいよっ 動詞 言い寄る て て 助詞 て

docs.title: 意思 (Meaning)
docs.text: 言い寄る: to court, to woo, to approach defiantly もう: now, soon, shortly, before long, presently, already, yet, by now, (not) anymore, further, more, again, another, the other

docs.title: 例句 (Example)
docs.text:
彼は彼女に言い寄った。

He made advances to her.

docs.title: 出典 (Source)
docs.text: Tatoeba

docs.text:
• Kotobank

docs.title: かばんをとってください
原句 (Original)
docs.text: かばんをとってください

docs.title: 分詞解析
docs.text: 表面形 讀音 詞性 原形 かばん かばん 名詞 鞄 を を 助詞 を とっ とっ 動詞 取る て て 助詞 て ください ください 動詞 下さる

docs.title: 意思 (Meaning)
docs.text: 鞄: bag, satchel, briefcase, basket 取る: to take, to pick up, to grab, to catch, to pass, to hand, to give, to get, to obtain, to acquire, to win, to receive, to earn, to take (e.g. a vacation), to adopt (a method, proposal, etc.), to take (a measure, attitude, etc.), to choose, to remove, to get rid of, to take off, to take away, to steal, to rob, to eat, to have (e.g. lunch), to take (e.g. vitamins), to pick (e.g. flowers), to gather, to extract (e.g. juice), to catch (e.g. fish), to take up (time, space), to occupy, to spare, to set aside, to secure, to reserve, to save, to put aside, to keep, to take (e.g. a joke), to interpret, to understand, to make out, to grasp, to record, to take down, to subscribe to (e.g. a newspaper), to take, to buy, to get, to order, to have delivered, to charge, to fine, to take (tax), to take (e.g. a wife), to take on (e.g. an apprentice), to adopt, to accept, to compete (in sumo, cards, etc.), to play 下さる: to give, to confer, to bestow, to kindly do for one, to oblige, to favour, to favor

docs.title: 文法 (Grammar)
docs.text: 〜てください → 請求（請～）

docs.title: 例句 (Example)
docs.text:
これらは市販されている最も上等のかばんだ。

These are the best bags on the market.

docs.title: 出典 (Source)
docs.text: Tatoeba

docs.title: 参考 (Reference)
docs.text:
• Kotobank
  • Weblio
